steps.t: Lochan Dúv can be found to the west of Lugun-nâla in Gloomingtarn. Hersegg has asked you to accompany her in combatting the Iron Crown at Lochan Dúv. …
The entrance to Mîn Lorg can be found somewhere within Lochan Dúv in Gloomingtarn. The Iron Crown commander held orders demanding an excavation of Mîn…
Hersegg can be found at the entrance to Mîn Lorg within Lochan Dúv in Gloomingtarn. You have found the entrance to Mîn Lorg. You should talk to Herseg…
